_doc: Portrait-slot RESOURCE+DIMS ground truth (ckpt 131): the dialogue portraits diverge port-vs-retail (L3 Mother: port renders var_b slot 704 at 176x144 res 0x882, retail renders 160x176). The resolved SLOT matches retail (cap4), so the port's slot->(resource,dims) REGISTRATION is the suspect. Pool table &DAT_008a760c; slot[i] addr = 0x8a760c + i*4; resource_id @+0x40, width @+0x20, height @+0x24. Read the arrival+house slots + the Father/Mother face-0x1e variant triples. PORT regs (asset_register.c): 676=0x8a4 160x176, 683=0x880 176x144, 697=0x8a6 160x176, 704=0x882 176x144, 711=?, 440=0x5a1 160x176, 450=0x5a6 160x176, 460=0x5b0 160x176, 461=0x5b1 160x176, 467=0x71f 176x144, 471=0x723 176x144. Run: nix develop --command python3 tools/frida_capture.py --no-turbo --lockstep --seed-pin --input-trace runs/control-path-gt/nav.jsonl --field-spec tools/flow/portrait_slot_dims.json --field-spec-only --call-trace --run-dir runs/portrait-slot-dims --duration-ms 60000

0x5b8fc0.name: flip
0x5b8fc0._note: DDraw Flip; read each portrait pool slot's resource_id(+0x40) width(+0x20) height(+0x24).
